examples: He pulls a rickshaw, probably the oldest form of human taxi service.
Bihar, a few hundred miles north of Kolkata, is where the vast majority of rickshaw pullers come from.
There are people in Kolkata, particularly educated and politically aware people, who will not ride in a rickshaw.
The company has also had a tight customer focus, laser-targeting auto-rickshaw drivers for the vehicle.
Its hurts our feeling when overweight people get onto our rickshaw and won't pay their fares.
